payload.title: Package source boundary

findings.problem: Package entrypoints still depend on root src as the source owner.
findings.recommendedRefactor: Move implementation ownership behind package-local entrypoints while keeping root src as compatibility shims.
findings.risk: Package contracts can drift from the implementation they are intended to own.

behavioralDifferences: Root src remains the compatibility API while package entrypoints become ownership roots.
duplicateScavenge.consolidationTarget: Package-owned entrypoint contract with root src compatibility shims.

conflictNotes: Duplicate-scavenge counterpart paths are review context only; this child review does not assign cross-slice write ownership.
Root src remains a temporary compatibility surface until package-owned entrypoints pass verification.
No provisioning package should be created because no concrete provisioning source surface was identified.
verificationSuggestions: bun run packages/rielflow/src/bin.ts workflow validate refactoring-slice-review --workflow-definition-dir .rielflow/workflows
residualRisks: No provisioning package is created without a concrete provisioning source surface.
